title: Maid Droid
overview: Recovering from a recent break-up, Harrison's life changes forever when he contacts the mysterious Maid Droid agency and he meets Mako, a beautiful android who serves his every wish. However, soon Mako starts to learn human emotions and memories from her past surface, leading her to act out in dangerous ways.
